github_repos.description: End-to-end robot learning policies for manipulation tasks
Deep learning for robust robot grasping and grasp synthesis

Diffusion-based imitation learning for dexterous manipulation

π0 foundation policies for dexterous robot manipulation
PDDL-based task-and-motion planning for manipulation
Unitree Go2/H1 quadruped and humanoid robot SDK
MoveIt2 motion planning for robot arm manipulation
ROS2 distributed robot operating system ecosystem

Human hand pose retargeting for dexterous robot hands

PyTorch-based robot torque control loops and policies
3D deep learning for robot point cloud processing
Point-E 3D object generation from text for robot tasks

HULC2 language-conditioned manipulation skill learning

offerings.name: roboticsRepoScan
offerings.description: Deep scan of a GitHub robotics repo — capabilities, API, integration guide, code examples. Powered by GitHub + arXiv.

offerings.name: graspPlannerSetup
offerings.description: Design a complete grasp planning pipeline for pick-and-place. Returns architecture, code snippets, Dex-Net integration guide.

offerings.name: navStackSetup
offerings.description: Nav2 autonomous navigation stack setup for mobile robot — config, launch files, costmap tuning guide.

offerings.name: objectDetectionPipeline
offerings.description: YOLOv8-based real-time object detection pipeline for robot perception — model selection, inference config, ROS2 integration.

offerings.name: segmentationMaskPlan
offerings.description: SAM-based segmentation strategy for robot workspace understanding — prompt design, mask filtering, downstream integration.

offerings.name: diffusionPolicyDesign
offerings.description: Diffusion policy training setup for dexterous manipulation — dataset format, network architecture, training config.

offerings.name: physicsSimConfig
offerings.description: Genesis/MuJoCo physics simulation configuration for robot task — scene MJCF/USD, solver params, contact model.

offerings.name: gpuSimTraining
offerings.description: Isaac Lab GPU-accelerated robot training workflow — environment setup, training script, hyperparameter guide.

offerings.name: rlEnvDesign
offerings.description: dm-control/MuJoCo RL training environment design — reward shaping, observation space, action space for robot task.

offerings.name: batchSimStrategy
offerings.description: Brax JAX batched physics simulation strategy — parallelisation plan, environment vectorisation, RL loop design.

offerings.name: embodiedNavPlan
offerings.description: Habitat-Sim embodied navigation task plan — scene setup, agent config, evaluation metrics, training curriculum.

offerings.name: openXDataQuery
offerings.description: Query Open X-Embodiment dataset for relevant demonstrations — dataset selection, filtering strategy, preprocessing guide.

offerings.name: foundationPolicyEval
offerings.description: Evaluate π0 (openpi) foundation policy fit for target robot task — capability assessment, fine-tuning guide, deployment plan.

offerings.name: taskMotionPlan
offerings.description: Full PDDL-based task-and-motion plan for manipulation task — predicate design, action templates, constraint specification.

offerings.name: unitreeDeployPlan
offerings.description: Deployment and motion plan for Unitree Go2/H1 robot — SDK setup, motion primitives, safety constraints, gait selection.

offerings.name: moveit2ArmPlan
offerings.description: MoveIt2 arm motion planning configuration — SRDF, kinematics plugin, planning pipeline, collision objects.

offerings.name: ros2NodeDesign
offerings.description: ROS2 node architecture design for robot system — topic graph, message types, lifecycle nodes, QoS profiles.

offerings.name: droneWaypointPlan
offerings.description: AirSim drone waypoint mission plan — environment setup, flight path, sensor config, collision avoidance strategy.

offerings.name: autoSceneDesign
offerings.description: CARLA autonomous driving scene design — actor spawning, traffic flow, sensor placement, scenario evaluation.

offerings.name: rlPolicyOptimize
offerings.description: Acme distributed RL policy optimization strategy — actor-learner setup, replay buffer config, policy architecture.

offerings.name: alohaSetupGuide
offerings.description: ALOHA bimanual teleoperation setup guide — hardware requirements, data collection protocol, ACT training pipeline.

offerings.name: dexRetargetDesign
offerings.description: Dex-Retargeting pipeline design — hand pose extraction, retargeting algorithm selection, robot hand mapping.

offerings.name: mobileRobotSetup
offerings.description: TurtleBot3 ROS2 navigation and perception setup — SLAM config, Nav2 integration, sensor calibration guide.

offerings.name: stretchArmTask
offerings.description: Hello Robot Stretch mobile manipulation task plan — reachability analysis, grasp strategy, home navigation integration.

offerings.name: ikSolverSetup
offerings.description: Pink IK solver configuration for robot arm — task specification, joint limits, velocity constraints, real-time loop.

offerings.name: torqueCtrlLoop
offerings.description: PyTorch torque control loop design — PD controller, impedance control, real-time execution, safety monitoring.

offerings.name: pointCloudPipeline
offerings.description: PyTorch3D 3D point cloud processing pipeline — filtering, segmentation, object recognition, surface estimation.

offerings.name: pointEObjectGen
offerings.description: Point-E 3D object generation strategy for robot tasks — prompt engineering, mesh export, collision model generation.

offerings.name: florenceVLRobot
offerings.description: Florence-2 vision-language integration for robot perception — prompt design, grounding, referring expression comprehension.

offerings.name: humanoidSimPlan
offerings.description: K-Scale humanoid simulation training plan — simulation setup, motion library, locomotion policy training.

offerings.name: robosuiteEnvSetup
offerings.description: Robosuite manipulation benchmark environment setup — task selection, robot config, observation space, evaluation protocol.

offerings.name: hulcLangSkill
offerings.description: HULC2 language-conditioned manipulation skill design — instruction set, multi-task training, skill chaining.

offerings.name: rtxPolicyScan
offerings.description: RT-X/RT-2 robotics transformer policy research — capability scan, fine-tuning requirements, deployment evaluation.

offerings.name: pyroboSimTask
offerings.description: PyRoboSim task-level simulation design — world model, robot agent, task planner, navigation and manipulation integration.

offerings.name: gibsonHomeSim
offerings.description: iGibson home simulation setup for household robot — scene loading, object states, task specs, VR integration.

offerings.name: pinocchioKDyn
offerings.description: Pinocchio kinematics and dynamics analysis — URDF parsing, forward/inverse kinematics, Jacobian, dynamics computations.

offerings.name: rlaxPolicyTrain
offerings.description: RLAX JAX RL algorithm component design — value function, policy gradient, actor-critic architecture for robot.

offerings.name: robotLogAnalyze
offerings.description: MCAP robot log analysis and diagnostics — topic inspection, timestamp analysis, sensor data replay, anomaly detection.

offerings.name: serlRLFinetune
offerings.description: SERL sample-efficient real-robot RL fine-tuning plan — reward design, data collection, online learning loop, safety constraints.

offerings.name: dexArtGraspPlan
offerings.description: DexArt dexterous articulated object manipulation plan — object category analysis, grasp synthesis, finger trajectory design.
